## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly events sync to discuss ongoing and upcoming event planning, logistics, and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent Kokari dinner event went well; future improvements identified for space utilization and guest interactions](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Surge happy hour and dinner planning underway; need to confirm details with Surge team](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Exploring potential sponsorship opportunities (SEMrush conference, Chili Piper events)](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Implementing new event management system in Notion for better organization and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=3363.0)

## Topics

### Kokari Dinner Post-Mortem

  - [Event was successful overall with positive feedback on food](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Space could accommodate more people; ideal capacity around low 20s](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Rectangular tables preferred over round for better interaction](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Pre-dinner networking felt awkward due to room layout](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Structured introductions and conversation starters recommended for future events](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)

### Surge Happy Hour Planning

  - [Venue chosen (Kyle); need to confirm budget (around $10K) and date with Surge team](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Aiming for 15-20 attendees, focusing on intimate gathering](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Exploring creative engagement ideas like "birds of a feather" tables](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=2518.0)
  - [Need to finalize menu, swag options, and invitation strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9AmPCrtNyLzH1oycWJ5FgWt-dxjvnac7?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
